description_long: This object consists of three cylindrical metal trash bins, each with a weathered teal paint finish and visible rust patches. The bins are open-topped, revealing different contents: one is empty, one is filled with assorted garbage including bags and bottles, and one has several colorful spray paint cans placed on its rim. The metal surfaces are slightly dented and have a matte, rough appearance, suggesting prolonged outdoor use. The interiors are unpainted, showing a brownish metal surface. There are no visible handles, wheels, or labeling on any of the bins.
description: A set of three weathered, open-top metal trash bins—one empty, one filled with garbage, and one topped with colorful spray cans.
description_view_0: Three bins are shown side by side: the left bin has spray cans on top, the middle is filled with trash, and the right is empty.
description_view_1: The bins are aligned front-to-back, highlighting the open tops and contents, with spray cans most visible on the front bin.
description_view_2: The bins are viewed from the opposite side, again showing the empty, trash-filled, and spray-can-topped bins in reverse order.
description_view_3: The bins are aligned back-to-front, with the spray cans most visible on the rear bin and the trash-filled bin in the middle.
